hero.title: AI for Window Cleaning
hero.description: Your virtual assistant modernizes your window cleaning business by bookings, tracking job routes, sending cleaning reminders, and scheduling follow-ups, so you can focus on shining windows.

stats.label: Fewer missed service appointments with automated reminders.
Reduction in hours spent scheduling and updating job notes.
Higher repeat bookings with personalized cleaning schedules and follow-ups.

intro.title: AI Virtual Receptionist for Window Cleaning Businesses

blocks.heading: A Smarter Way to Run Your Window Cleaning Business
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we know how busy window cleaners can get — juggling jobs, managing quotes, and keeping clients happy. Whether you're a one-person operation working locally, a small cleaning crew, or managing a large commercial cleaning business, our AI Virtual Receptionist keeps things running smoothly. It answers calls, takes bookings, handles repeat schedules, and manages inquiries automatically — so you never miss a client or job.

blocks.heading: Focus on the Job, Not the Phone
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist takes care of calls and messages while you're on-site or up a ladder. It can respond instantly to questions like 'Do you clean double-storey homes?', 'Can I get a quote for commercial windows?', or 'When's my next appointment?' with clear, friendly, and professional replies. It also books appointments, reschedules regular cleans, and sends reminders to help reduce no-shows and cancellations.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Booking or Repeat Client
blocks.description: Even during busy workdays or after hours, your AI Receptionist ensures every client is looked after. It provides information about your services — from residential window cleaning and solar panel washing to gutter cleaning and high-rise jobs — and books new jobs straight into your calendar. Whether you're working solo or managing a full team, it helps you stay organized and efficient 24/7.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subtitle: Enhance your cleaning business with smart automation that saves time, improves customer service, and drives repeat clients.

cards.title: Capture Every Call
cards.description: Never miss a booking or client inquiry — even when you're working on-site.

cards.title: Automated Scheduling
cards.description: Books, confirms, and reschedules cleaning jobs automatically to keep your calendar full.

cards.title: Fully Customizable to Your Business
cards.description: Your AI Receptionist can be trained specifically to your workflow, tone, and services — from once-off cleans to regular maintenance plans.

cards.title: Works for All Business Sizes
cards.description: Ideal for solo cleaners, small teams, and large cleaning companies — scaling effortlessly as you grow.

cards.title: Affordable 24/7 Support
cards.description: Operates like a full-time receptionist without the cost or downtime.

cards.title: Improved Customer Experience
cards.description: Delivers quick, friendly, and accurate responses that help build trust and repeat business.

cards.title: Time-Saving Automation
cards.description: AI handles reminders, quote confirmations, and post-cleaning follow-ups so you can focus on growing your business.

cards.title: Boosted Client Retention
cards.description: Automated check-ins and seasonal cleaning reminders keep your clients engaged and ensure regular bookings.

cards.title: Centralized Job Records
cards.description: Store all client data, service history, and job photos in one place — easily accessible for repeat or team jobs.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Window Cleaners Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is trusted by window cleaners across Australia — from local sole traders to large commercial cleaning companies. It integrates seamlessly with your scheduling software, CRM, and communication tools, handling every call and booking with professionalism. Best of all, your AI Receptionist can be trained specifically to your business — matching your tone, services, and customer approach. Let our AI take care of your admin so you can focus on what you do best — delivering spotless results and happy customers.

card.heading: Simplify Client Notes and Follow-Ups
card.description: After each clean, record a quick voice memo that's automatically transcribed and summarized — perfect for noting specific client preferences, access details, or maintenance notes. Upload invoices, service reports, and client photos directly into your dashboard for simple, organized record-keeping.
